===================
=== Bob Dylan 13 Nov 1990  Ohio.txt
===================
===================
===================
University Of Dayton Arena, Ohio, November 13, 1990

Size:687MB 

CB master version > Trade > CDR > Wav > FLAC(Level:8)

Maybe same recording as LB-1221.

Time : 70:23/28:07

CD 1
01.    Marine Hymn (trad.)
02.    Tangled Up In Blue
03.    Just Like A Woman
04.    Ballad Of A Thin Man
05.    All Along The Watchtower
06.    I'll Remember You
07.    Gotta Serve Somebody
08.    Gates Of Eden
09.    To Ramona
10.    One Too Many Mornings
11.    Mr. Tambourine Man
12.    Everything Is Broken
13.    Joey (Bob Dylan & Jacques Levy)
14.    Seeing The Real You At Last
15.    Wiggle Wiggle

CD 2
01.    Under The Red Sky
02.    I Shall Be Released
03.    Like A Rolling Stone
04.    It Ain't Me, Babe
05.    Maggie's Farm


Concert # 259 of The Never-Ending Tour.  Concert # 26 of the 1990 USA Fall Tour. 1990 concert # 89.
Concert # 18 with third Never-Ending Tour band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), John Staehely (guitar), Cesar Diaz (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums).
8-11, 19 acoustic with the band.
1  short instrumental.
3, 4, 6, 9-12, 16, 19  Bob Dylan harmonica.
